offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We consolidate expense data instead of manual tracking and spreadsheet management.
problem: Difficulty in consolidating expense data for accurate monthly bookkeeping.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where Etsy sellers seek help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar challenges
Direct message outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Engage in community forums for Etsy seller tools
try_it: Let users try expense data extraction and report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Allow CSV import for existing data
